assertions.title: Schema compat test passes after all milestones

steps.expected: All tests pass including schema compat

steps.observed: Python env set to nonexistent paths

steps.action: Run tg run --lang python with AST pattern on test file
Run tg run --verbose to check routing

evidence.keyResult: tg run succeeds with invalid Python; routing shows sidecar_used=false

steps.action: Record mtime of test_simple.py before dry-run

steps.observed: Plan with 3 edits emitted. Mtime unchanged: True. Content preserved: True.
Batch plan with 3 edits emitted. Mtime unchanged: True. Content preserved: True.

evidence.keyResult: Both single and batch dry-run produce plans without modifying files

assertions.title: Overlap validation before write after all milestones

steps.action: Create batch config with overlapping patterns
steps.observed: Config with two patterns that produce overlapping edits on test_overlap.py
3 overlapping edits rejected. rejected_overlaps array has 3 entries. File unchanged.

evidence.keyResult: rejected_overlaps present with 3 entries; file mtime and content unchanged

assertions.title: Atomic writes used by batch rewrite

steps.action: Check for .tg_tmp_* files before batch apply
Run batch rewrite with --apply on test_atomic.py
steps.expected: Edit applied, no temp files remain
steps.observed: 1 edit applied. File contains 'Earth'. No .tg_tmp_* files after.

steps.expected: Batch rewrite delegates to atomic write
steps.observed: apply_edits_to_file (line 632) calls atomic_write_file (line 652). Batch path calls apply_edits_to_file (line 665).

evidence.codeInspection: rust_core/src/backend_ast.rs: apply_edits_to_file->atomic_write_file delegation confirmed at lines 632-665
evidence.keyResult: Batch rewrite uses atomic write path; no temp files left after successful apply

assertions.title: Encoding safety preserved in batch rewrite

steps.action: Create BOM file (EF BB BF prefix), CRLF file, binary file with NUL

steps.expected: BOM preserved, CRLF preserved, binary skipped

steps.action: Verify BOM first 3 bytes after rewrite

evidence.keyResult: BOM preserved, CRLF preserved, binary file skipped — all encoding guarantees upheld in batch rewrite

steps.action: Run cargo test for stale-file detection tests
steps.expected: Both single and batch stale-file tests pass
Stale check at start of apply

evidence.cargoTest: Both test_apply_rewrites_rejects_stale_file and test_batch_rewrite_apply_rejects_stale_file passed in cargo test
evidence.codeInspection: ensure_file_not_stale called at line 633 of apply_edits_to_file, shared by both single and batch paths
evidence.keyResult: Stale-file detection works for both single and batch rewrite via cargo tests and code inspection

assertions.title: E2E agent workflow uses unified JSON

steps.observed: version=1, routing_backend=AstBackend, plan.version=1, plan.routing_backend=AstBackend, verification present

steps.action: Validate all steps have unified v1 fields
steps.observed: All steps have version=1: True, All have routing_backend: True, All have routing_reason: True

evidence.keyResult: Complete search->plan->apply->verify workflow uses unified v1 JSON at every step

assertions.title: All test suites pass after every milestone

steps.observed: Success: no issues found in 44 source files

evidence.mypy: Success: no issues found in 44 source files
evidence.keyResult: All four test suites pass with counts exceeding minimums

assertions.title: GPU search correctness parity with CPU

steps.observed: GPU backends unavailable: CuDF and Torch GPU backends were unavailable
3 correctness checks, all PASS with matches_equal=true and files_equal=true

steps.expected: Match counts and file sets identical
steps.observed: Pattern 1: rg=2, gpu=2; Pattern 2: rg=16, gpu=16; Pattern 3: rg=8, gpu=8. All files identical.

evidence.keyResult: GPU correctness parity verified via historical benchmark: 3 patterns, all match counts and file sets identical

assertions.issues: GPU Python backends currently unavailable; validated via historical bench_gpu_scale.json evidence per deferred-gpu-correctness-validation guidance

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 10 passed. All cross-area invariants verified: schema compat (145 cargo tests), Python-free AST backend, dry-run safety, overlap validation, atomic writes, encoding safety (BOM/CRLF/binary), stale-file detection, E2E unified JSON workflow, full test suites (145 Rust + 549 Python + ruff + mypy). GPU correctness validated via historical benchmark evidence (3 patterns, all match counts identical).
